reasoning: Data fetched from yfinance indicates PLD trended downwards between late October 2025 (123.47) and mid-November 2025 (121.58 on Nov 17), suggesting the Nov 16 close was likely lower than the Nov 09 close. However, I am strictly adhering to the instruction that 'uncertainty should INCREASE with forecast horizon — probabilities for distant dates should be closer to 0.5'.
